name: Orange-Almond Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Whole almonds with skins (toasted, cool, chop coarse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first three ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Beat butter and sugar together in a bowl of an electric mixer until light and smooth. Add eggs one at a time, then extracts. Stir in almonds and zest.
3. Sift dry ingredients over egg mixture, then fold in until dough is just mixed.
4. Follow steps 3 and 4 in Lemon-Anise Biscotti. VARIATIONS: Toasted hazelnuts may substitute for almonds in this recipe. A combination of hazelnuts and almonds also works well.
